title: persica oblonga
intro: Persica oblonga, also known as the peach tree, is a deciduous tree native to China and is a variety of the peach species (Prunus persica). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of amygdalin and other compounds. The health benefits of Persica oblonga include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as potential antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, although its uses and preparations may vary depending on the region and traditional practices.
